Afford4.role: supplementary candidate construct when reliability and missingness are acceptable

reliability_policy.cronbach_alpha: Internal-consistency diagnostic only; it does not establish validity by itself.
reliability_policy.notes: Composite scores may be exported for diagnostics, but manuscript claims should prioritize item-level S outcomes unless reliability and construct rationale are documented.

claim_policy.wwr_polynomial: Three WWR levels support linear/quadratic trend language only, not definitive optimum identification.
claim_policy.ipq: IPQ is analyzed at participant level; WWR/Complexity trial-level inference is not reported for repeated IPQ values.

notes: Inspired by the external spss questionnaire workflow, but corrected for this multimodal paper pipeline: no forced global scale, B items are C1-only, and IPQ is subject-level.
